description: Analyze blog categories, performance. Segment 380 articles, correlate w/ 200 leads generated in last 6-8 months. Identify high-performing topics.
Provide keyword ranking data. Reactivate keyword tracking. Focus on high-intent keywords generating leads. Report current rankings, suggest improvement strategies.
Analyze internal lead sources. Investigate gap between 32 Growth X leads vs 154 total April leads. Identify other major lead sources.
Generate report on clicks/impressions for 3 SQL-generating articles (video commerce, live stream shopping stats, what is video commerce). Include historical data.
Escalate Webflow publishing issue to VP of Sales. Emphasize 4-hour SLA in contract, 5-day publishing delay. Cc Ritesh on communication.
Move all GrowthX-related communications to Firework GrowthX Slack channel. Stop using DMs for issue reporting.
